what_it_does: Stores a YAML-frontmatter ledger entry that records an image attachment tied to a design-source channel target.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
The target is an image:// URI pointing to design-source/recent-pitches/p-24.
standouts: The attachment points to a specific pitch image asset (recent-pitches/p-24) in the design-source channel.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a stable id prefixed by 'att-'.
Follows a channel-memory ledger format for attachments.
notes: This is a lightweight metadata stub that links a design-source channel memory entry to an image asset.
intention_signals: To create a discoverable, timestamped record associating an image with a design-source pitch or conversation.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped pointer from a channel memory entry to an external image asset, enabling retrieval and context assembly.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment ledger stub that records an image attachment targeting image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-24 with a timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image attachment linked to a design-source pitch for later reference and context reconstruction.
